title: The Round Tea Party
description:
You find an [orange]invitation[/orange] for a [blue]“Sir Galalot”[/blue] to a tea party and decide to show up in his stead.

Upon entering an unassuming rotunda, you find yourself in the midst of [gold]commanders[/gold], [aqua]generals[/aqua], [red]warlords[/red], and [blue]mercenaries[/blue] having... tea?
The gigantic knight donning a [gold]golden crown[/gold] speaks.

[jitter]“Thou art late for [b]Tea[/b]?!”[/jitter]
conditions: All players have at least 12 HP
notes: This is a multi-page event with branching outcomes. Choosing [gold]Pick a Fight[/gold] displays a battle scene description on the next page, then presents a [gold]Continue[/gold] button that applies the 11 HP damage and grants a random relic. The [gold]Continue[/gold] choice does not appear in the choice history. [gold]Enjoy Your Tea[/gold] grants the [gold]Royal Poison[/gold] relic and heals you to full HP immediately.
